item.title: Live Updates: U.K. Police Arrest Former Prince Andrew Over Epstein Ties, BBC Reports
item.description: The British police on Thursday arrested Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor on suspicion of criminal activity linked to the Epstein files.

item.title: Live Updates: South Korean Ex-Leader Is Sentenced to Life in Prison
item.description: Former President Yoon Suk Yeol, who was impeached after he briefly imposed martial law in 2024, had faced a potential death sentence in the country’s ...

item.title: Besides Yoon, 5 other former officials get long prison terms.
Here’s the latest.
item.description: The British police on Thursday arrested Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor on suspicion of criminal activity linked to the Epstein files.

item.title: Europe Worries About Another Trump Blowup, This One on Tech
item.description: Even as trade tensions between the United States and the European Union seem to calm, officials are concerned that a showdown is brewing over the bloc...
